---
title: Update a company onboarding
---

# Update a company onboarding

Update company onboardings using the API.

:::caution Updating related individuals
Fields about related individuals can't be updated incrementally.
If you need to update related individual information, **you must submit all of the fields again**.
:::

import UpdateOnboardingPrereqs from '../partials/_prereqs-update.mdx';

<UpdateOnboardingPrereqs />

## Guide {#api-guide}

To test updating a company onboarding, **change the preferred language**.

1. First, [retrieve the ID](../overview/guide-get-info) for the onboarding you need to update.
1. Call the `updateCompanyAccountHolderOnboarding` mutation.
1. Enter the onboarding ID retrieved in step 1.
1. Add the `accountAdmin.preferredLanguage` field with the language code of your choosing (example: `fr` or `es`).
1. Add desired messages to the success payload, either for validation or in case of rejection.

:::tip Deprecated mutation
The previous `updateCompanyOnboarding` mutation is deprecated but still functional.
Use `updateCompanyAccountHolderOnboarding` for all new integrations.
:::

## Mutation {#mutation}

<a href="https://explorer.swan.io?&tab=api" className="explorer-badge">Open in API Explorer</a>

```graphql {4-7,11-14} showLineNumbers
mutation UpdateCompanyOnboarding {
  updateCompanyAccountHolderOnboarding(
    input: {
      onboardingId: "$ONBOARDING_ID"
      accountAdmin: {
        preferredLanguage: fr
      }
    }
  ) {
    ... on UpdateCompanyAccountHolderOnboardingSuccessPayload {
      __typename
      onboarding {
        statusInfo {
          status
        }
      }
    }
    ... on OnboardingNotFoundRejection {
      __typename
    }
    ... on OnboardingAlreadyFinalizedRejection {
      __typename
    }
  }
}
```

## Payload {#payload}

```json {6-8} showLineNumbers
{
  "data": {
    "updateCompanyAccountHolderOnboarding": {
      "__typename": "UpdateCompanyAccountHolderOnboardingSuccessPayload",
      "onboarding": {
        "statusInfo": {
          "status": "Valid"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```
